titleStmt.title: SII 9.113: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 113. (A.R. No. 295 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE TANK-BED AT HIREMAGALAGERI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 975, Vijaya, Āshāḍha, śu. 3, Ādityavāra corresponding to A.D. 1054 June 26, Sunday. It records that Jagadēkamalla-Noḷamba-Brahmādirāja who bore the title “lord of Kāñchī” made a gift of land for the service of the god Svayambhudēva, after washing the feet of Chandrabhūshaṇa-Paṇḍita and that he exempted 4 Dēvadāsis from house and mirror taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda pallavānvaya kāṁ
cīpuravarēśvaraṁ pūrvva
sūcitāḷāpa kra saha
śradaṁḍamodalāgi duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭapra thāvi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samasta rūpita
mahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitra
yasaṁpannaṁ pratipa(ṁ)nnasa(ṁ)nnāhaṁ sivapādaśēkharaṁ nītiratnākaraṁ gaṇa na
nuḍidaṁte ga(ṁ)ṇḍaṁ sārvvalōkasamuddharaṇaṁ patihitagaruḍa nāmādisamastapra
sastisahitaṁ śrīmadda(ṁ)ṇḍanāyakaṁ jagadēkamallanoḷaṁbabrahmādirāja nayyaṁ mē
gaṇageṟeyanabhyantarasiddhiyoḷu pravartisutta śakavarṣa 975 neya vijeyasaṁ
vatsarada Āśāḍha su 3 Ādityaradaṁdu palliya svayaṁbhudēvara gaṁ mārppa paṟe
kāṟarggaṁ pātrakkaṁ saṁtataṁ patrepu pūjegaṭṭuva pūjārigavalli sthānādhipa
ti caṁdrabhūṣaṇapaṁḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁmāḍi biṭṭa berddale matta 5 piriyake
ṟeya keḷage 10 koḷagaveregaddeyuṁ dīvigegeraḍettugāṇamaṁ kaṁbhada nālvar sūḷeyara
manevaṇamuṁ kannaḍivaṇamumaṁ biṭṭa Idanāvanorvvaṁ pratipāḷisidaṁ vāṇarāsiyo
ḷana(ṁ)ntakavileyaṁ biṭṭakṣayadānamumaśvamēdhamuṁgeyda phaḷamakkuṁ Ida
nāvanorvvanaḷidana(ṁ)ntanitumanaḷida pātakanakku .
Digital edition of SII 9.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
